final:
module johnson_counter_3bit 
(
  input rst_n,
  input clk,
  input enable,

  output reg [2:0] out
);

    wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n or posedge dbg_halt) begin
    if (!rst_n) 
	begin
      out <= 3'b000;
    end 
	else if (enable) 
	begin
      out <= {~out[0], out[2:1]};
    end 
	else 
	begin
      out <= out; // Hold the current value when enable is inactive
    end
  end

endmodule
